name: Tina Smith
subject: Donald Trump is challenging you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
He thinks he can defeat us in Minnesota. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b571/c1f7015/6815dc4b/1142a577/2618857369/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-trump?refcode=rtw_180612_trumprally_em-nd") Friends- Donald Trump thinks he can win Minnesota. That's why he's coming here to host a rally, and why he's putting our race at the top of his target list. He thinks he can bully and attack us, get his super PACs to spend millions in ads, then turn his 1.5 point loss in 2016 into a victory for Republicans up and down the ticket. **This election is just too important to let that happen. If we lose this race, there is no chance for Democrats to take back control of the Senate and absolutely no chance to make progress on the issues we care about.** And the truth is, we're falling behind our fundraising goals. If we come up short, Trump and his allies will see Democrats' lack of enthusiasm and use that to raise even more money and spend even more time campaigning against us. **[With our biggest end-of-quarter deadline approaching, will you rush a contribution of $3 or more right now to fight back? Every dollar makes a difference and sends the message that Democrats are ready to take on Trump's challenge in Minnesota.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b571/c1f7015/6815dc4b/1142a577/2618857369/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-trump?refcode=rtw_180612_trumprally_em-nd")** Make no mistake, he could be successful if you don't step up. He has millions of dollars, a big microphone, and the backing of billionaire special interests who love his agenda. **[If you've been holding back, now is the time to pitch in.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b571/c1f7015/6815dc4b/1142a577/2618857369/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-trump?refcode=rtw_180612_trumprally_em-nd")** Thank you for being a part of this, Tina **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b571/c1f7015/6815dc4b/1142a577/2618857369/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-trump?refcode=rtw_180612_trumprally_em-nd")**
---

[Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b571/c1f7015/6815dc4b/1142a548/2618857369/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: BREAKING-NEWS@SherrodBrown.com
subject: New poll: Single digits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | **BREAKING: Poll shows Brown leading Renacci by 4 points** News broke yesterday that should have all of us worried, Peter. A new poll shows Sherrod and his opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, separated by single digits. [**_This is serious cause for concern. We need to keep the momentum on our side -- can you help by chipping in $26?_**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff919/4462dc26/51b2b142/2007c3f6/1012420466/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612pm?refcode=sbe1806012pm_a&amount=26") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff919/4462dc26/51b2b142/2007c3f5/1012420466/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjEycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180612pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff919/4462dc26/51b2b142/2007c3f5/1012420466/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjEycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180612pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff919/4462dc26/51b2b142/2007c3f5/1012420466/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjEycG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180612pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff919/4462dc26/51b2b142/2007c3f4/1012420466/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjEycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612pm?refcode=sbe180612pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** It's been a tough few weeks in this race: Renacci is on TV with attack ads. The NRSC has already launched ads against Sherrod. Meanwhile, we can't forget that Renacci has already raised $4.5 million, and will have the backing of this White House and special interest groups. **There 's simply too much on the line for us to come up short in November.** Under Republican leadership, millions of Americans could see their healthcare disappear, while others are at risk of not getting their pensions. Outside money continues to flood our elections, and this administration just proposed raising rent for families who are already struggling. The list of issues we face is seemingly endless. If we want to make progress in this country, we need Sherrod in the Senate, fighting hard to make sure all Ohioans -- no matter their background, gender, or income -- have a fair chance to succeed. [**_Help make sure Sherrod stays on track. Pitch in $5, $10, or match our average online contribution of $26 today._**](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff919/4462dc26/51b2b142/2007c3f4/1012420466/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjEycG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612pm?refcode=sbe180612pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thanks, Team Sherrod

name: Rapid Response from Team Kaine
subject: Just Announced → Election Night in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad8/1360223985/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")

| | **BREAKING:** The race is set, Derek.

Our campaign is so proud to be running alongside so many incredible Democrats who are ready to help bring the blue wave to Virginia. Congratulations to every Democrat who played a part in this exciting day - and thank you to every one of you who got out there and made your voices heard at the polls!

**[Next up: electing Democrats up and down the ticket on November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340adf/1360223985/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Next+up+electing+Democrats+up+and+down+t&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")**

Political forecasters have their eyes on several key races across the Commonwealth that will be tough to win - but are within our reach.

We have chosen inspiring and strong leaders as our Democratic candidates [tonight,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ade/1360223985/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+tonight&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey") and we are excited to fight with them between now and November.

**But here 's the thing:** The stakes are higher than ever now, especially when you consider who Tim is running against.

Corey Stewart wants to make this election about confederate monuments and racist, anti-immigrant rhetoric so he can bring his radical agenda to the Senate.

We need to stop him, and we also need to talk about issues like health care and jobs - issues that Tim has spent his entire career fighting for.

[Corey Stewart might be extreme, but that doesn't mean he's not a threat: A recent poll had Tim at just 44% when pitted against Stewart.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340add/1360223985/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+Corey+Stewart+might+be+extreme+but+that+&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")

[Stewart thinks that Democrats won't donate to Tim Kaine this year, so we need to send a message that we aren't taking anything for granted. Chip in whatever you can right now to show that Tim has supporters behind him who understand just how critical this race is.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340adc/1360223985/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Stewart+thinks+that+Democrats+wonrsquot+&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey") | [**DONATE TO GENERAL ELECTION FUND**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad3/1360223985/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+TO+GENERAL+ELECTION+FUND&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")
---
Thanks for staying up to watch the results with us.

It's game time, Derek.

_\- Team Kaine_

[https://secure.timkaine.com/General-Election-Fund](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad2/1360223985/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+httpssecuretimkainecomGeneralElectionFun&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")

|
---
[](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad1/1360223985/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad0/1360223985/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/timkaine?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey") [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad7/1360223985/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.instagram.com/timkaine/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad6/1360223985/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad5/1360223985/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=12+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340ad4/1360223985/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13e9/3e0906/656e2ecb/3e340d2b/1360223985/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey&source=20180612_2_FR_TEAM_Results-Corey")

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: big news! [election results]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Team - The primary night results are in, and I'm honored to be Nevada's Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate!
We're running against Republican Dean Heller, the most vulnerable Senator in the country this year. He's spent the last year letting Nevadans down by breaking his promises to protect our health care, passing a fiscally irresponsible tax bill to benefit his super-wealthy donors, and failing our Dreamers - all to please Mitch McConnell and President Trump.
Nevadans deserve a Senator with a backbone, not a rubber stamp. A Senator who will work to protect our health care, and always fight for what's right. **It 's time for a change - and that's where you come in.**
**[We've set a goal of reaching 500 contributions tonight. Can you chip in $5 towards our Primary Night goal so we can kick off the general election with the resources we need to win?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7ff/4fbb2af3/70e2f6bf/5e8a484b/3249119164/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk752-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Representing Nevadans in Congress has been the honor of my life, and I look forward to continuing this service as Nevada's next Senator. Our race is Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. I'm working hard to get this job done, and I'm glad to have you by my side in this fight.

**But I 'm not going to sugarcoat it: the next 147 days won't be easy.** We know the Republicans are desperate to hold onto their Senate majority, and they can't do that without winning here in Nevada - so they're going to pour in millions of dollars to defeat me. And polls show our race is a dead heat, so every dollar counts.

[**Please, contribute before midnight so we can reach our Primary Night goal and start tomorrow strong.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7ff/4fbb2af3/70e2f6bf/5e8a4848/3249119164/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk752-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7ff/4fbb2af3/70e2f6bf/5e8a484b/3249119164/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azc1Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk752-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Onward to November,

Jacky
** **
********
********

****Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126****

**** | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7ff/4fbb2af3/70e2f6bf/5e8a4849/3249119164/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7ff/4fbb2af3/70e2f6bf/5e8a4856/3249119164/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We're running against Republican Dean Heller, the most vulnerable Senator in the country this year. He's spent the last year letting Nevadans down by breaking his promises to protect our health care, passing a fiscally irresponsible tax bill to benefit his super-wealthy donors, and failing our Dreamers - all to please Mitch McConnell and President Trump. Nevadans deserve a Senator with a backbone, not a rubber stamp. A Senator who will work to protect our health care, and always fight for what's right. It 's time for a change - and that's where you come in. "" Representing Nevadans in Congress has been the honor of my life, and I look forward to continuing this service as Nevada's next Senator. Our race is Democrats' best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. I'm working hard to get this job done, and I'm glad to have you by my side in this fight. But I 'm not going to sugarcoat it: the next 147 days won't be easy. name: Donald J. Trump
subject: 500 days. Can you believe it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
I want to hear what you think. |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=139baec14a66b51fdf366a92ad25fbbcb4dbd9d9dee0be3829fbdca6008ab09d5cc215e965be98e648917c397e7191f64ff7cc1467ae1995)**

Friend,

It's been over 500 days since I took the Oath of Office and promised you we would Make America Great Again!

It's been my great honor to fight for you. But because our mission has been about you, I want to hear your thoughts and opinions.

**[Please take the First 500 Days Approval Survey.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=139baec14a66b51f2de14e4f77224d4c465b12e0bc881a94d44711e99e2c35dc402b88845b84326122cc0f3f87050df8f26e268fd48b0441)**

Because of your support, Friend, we have....
* Put ISIS on the run, and sent a message to our adversaries that terrorism and threats against our national security will no longer be tolerated

* Initiated historic talks with North Korea to denuclearize the Korean peninsula and achieve peace and global stability

* Enacted sweeping tax reform, putting hard earned money back in the pockets of Americans

* Brought the unemployment numbers to a record low, tying the lowest rate since 1969 Reduced harmful regulations on American industry that had been crippling the U.S. Economy since the Obama administration

* Strengthened our borders like never before: criminals are now being stopped at the border, harmful drugs are being seized, and America is getting safer

....and so much more.

No longer is the government working against the American People. Now, with your help, I am putting its power back into your hands.

But what matters most is that YOU approve of the work we've done to Make America Great Again!

**[So please, make it your priority to take my First 500 Days Approval Survey today to let me know what you think of the job we've done so far.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=139baec14a66b51f707ef3f82a354f8eea9412700bdf4ac36415e2f0533bb28e43e77dddd7a9ff05ceec4603e5880a192d059c09176ea25e)**

Thanks,

Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Republican Party and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. subject: What we are up against
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ian Todd for Congress
body:
Another corporate merger takes more power away from the American people.

Donate Now! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=attmerge&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=314b1a232b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_06_12_11_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-314b1a232b-9291445)

** The AT&T Merger hurts us all.
------------------------------------------------------------
Friends,

We have on our hands yet another corporate merger. This is part of an ongoing trend where the rich accumulate greater wealth and use it to gain monopolistic power over the markets. They then turn around and direct this wealth at politicians and use their influence to gain political protection from honest scrutiny.

The time has passed for politicians to be complacent in allowing monopolies to grow in our nation. It is time for bold leadership to protect competitive markets, and to ensure that small entrepreneurs have a fair chance in the economy. We must also fight to protect the consumers and employees who stand to lose real economic power as they lose options and opportunity.

Donate today so that I can continue my efforts to win and bring a strong voice into Washington that will stand up to the unchecked concentration of power.
Donate Now! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=attmerge&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=314b1a232b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_06_12_11_48&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-314b1a232b-9291445)

** "Concentration of wealth yields concentration of political power. And concentration of political power gives rise to legislation that increases and accelerates the cycle."

- Noam Chomsky

** Paid for by Ian Todd for Congress.

name: Shelbie Konkel, Davis for Kansas
subject: I’m tired, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzz3iUxLIpsKBQ9vUCJKosF69Incw9rCEwU4QkO4Pbw=/Vz9Qxnoeoe9t9q5KpYf7PbEPpTlBV8ze28YPug1J29c=?gpsid=11_36_1213&refcode=em18_180613_midmo1_fnd_gq_ful__SK&utm_campaign=em18_180613_midmo1_fnd_gq_ful__SK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Dear Peter,

I don't know about you, but I'm tired of the way things are. Our leaders are more concerned with fighting each other than standing up for their constituents. Nothing gets done -- and there's no denying that it's time for things to change.

That's why I joined this team to help elect Paul Davis. But massive special interest donors and billionaires have already pledged to spend millions to keep things exactly the way they are now.

**[Peter, it's going to take all of us to make a difference and change the way our leaders act -- and that starts with sending Paul Davis to D.C. in November. Chip in to help make it happen!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzz3iUxLIpsKBQ9vUCJKosF69Incw9rCEwU4QkO4Pbw=/Vz9Qxnoeoe9t9q5KpYf7PbEPpTlBV8ze28YPug1J29c=?gpsid=11_36_1213&refcode=em18_180613_midmo1_fnd_gq_ful__SK&utm_campaign=em18_180613_midmo1_fnd_gq_ful__SK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

We're up against some huge obstacles. Paul Ryan's super PAC already purchased over a million dollars of ads right here in the 2nd District -- and it's only a matter of time before more money comes flooding in to pay for misleading attack ads.

As Paul's finance director, I know that going toe-to-toe with big spenders like Ryan or the Koch Brothers won't be easy. But I'm also confident that you're up to the challenge.

**[Let's show them what we're made of -- chip in whatever you can right now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Bzz3iUxLIpsKBQ9vUCJKosF69Incw9rCEwU4QkO4Pbw=/Vz9Qxnoeoe9t9q5KpYf7PbEPpTlBV8ze28YPug1J29c=?gpsid=11_36_1213&refcode=em18_180613_midmo1_fnd_gq_ful__SK&utm_campaign=em18_180613_midmo1_fnd_gq_ful__SK&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Shelbie Konkel
Finance Director

name: The White House
subject: Reactions to a new era of American diplomacy
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f74291f9e7efc82852f9eadbab7d9234932bc89b939cc996ad2e5cab43238f1dbf6a2ed471c0be5bc91ce4c8461b521ec4a03b) The White House • June 13, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump has returned to Washington following his historic summit with North Korea's Kim Jong Un earlier this week.
---|---
• | The White House hosts the top 10 team finalists for the Community College Innovation Challenge, highlighting the importance of STEM education in America.

---
|

## Reactions to a new era of American diplomacy
**Leaders the world over spoke of the powerful significance** of President Trump's summit with Kim Jong Un this week. South Korean President Moon Jae-in [called the meeting](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f74291a06b32de54c3093e82cf0afc04e88fc88914b73a051085e54e72a75f51032dddb16d6b344d90b6aeb49144ed4256c028) "historic," adding that "we will never go back to the past again." According to the _New York Post_ , people broke into cheers and applause at a train station in Seoul as President Trump shook Chairman Kim's hand on TV.
**Here at home, U.S. officials look forward to a new chapter**. "For decades, American policy toward North Korea has failed, and I commend @POTUS for not accepting the status quo," Speaker of the House Paul Ryan (R-WI) tweeted. "This an historic opportunity to end the Korean War [and] get North Korea to give up their weapons and missiles," Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-SC) said.
**Security expert Christian Whiton explains what the President's critics miss** about the summit. In the past, U.S. administrations gave away too much upfront. "This time, President Trump and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo have insisted that North Korea undertake actual disarmament before real financial concessions or even sanctions relief," Whiton writes. [Read more](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f7429159fd5c2f31501462545e34533c41e1c4a5b2e183e03be6ac99ddc0802f9a309aa9c075ea910492d649092f88ad939813).
[See all the reactions to President Trump's summit with Kim Jong Un.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f742910cce7bf1a161f19092093ca0613d046b8b3e519e2bf26127db11302b78650f808f9fc9131d0f2828a7bef95aef546330)
**In case you missed it** : [Watch the President meet Chairman Kim. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f74291036b3b43dfe4acc8cb73b7028fc65ad3a6d7a3e9c5665611248d5388a1698d24e36ac9addcbbd5bc6f2d302ed29c35ba)

---
|

## A message on Men's Health Week
**June 11 -17 is Men's Health Week**, celebrated each year during the week leading up to Father's Day. President Trump released a message on Monday reminding American men of the importance of monitoring their physical and mental health--this week and always.
**"While there are many factors that contribute to a healthy life** --including diet, exercise, stress management, and mental and emotional wellness--one of the most important practices is to regularly visit the doctor and the dentist," President Trump says. "Men are less likely than women to visit their healthcare providers, often missing out on critical treatments that can protect their overall health and wellbeing."
[Read President Trump's full message on Men's Health Week](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f74291c25e8d7bc43a9eff3a842ad929eff8729a4f4f9d2570c2cd1e3f65e2766770fa5b34e4c5e697ba62fcedc8e7a121974b).

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump departs Singapore** | June 12, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f74291710698fb67e712e4731fec1d2d160316d99713d6f3e29857b46fb8f2d865d2a4c9fefaf949216c0fd534d6eee63b3f07) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=fc40b8e894f742916fbf3777d435807ee6b9f9b3e832c31fb6f18491b8fdede56151c47be18f1fd7c99aad7babd7d09224b09db1379928d8) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4e9375fe9818be2540657475a8ae511bcc86e41cde831765350ccbe47ccfde46ec60f79139eff4d9fbcaa9aa6a4810f53fdd1f6a2f67dce71)
---

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Steve King did what?!?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
I’m not running just to beat Steve King, I’m running to give the people of this district the representation they deserve and have been missing for far too long. I prefer to talk about the positive things we can do to improve the lives of the people in this district so, instead of talking about Steve King here, I’ll let the headlines speak for themselves...
It's bizarre that Steve King, as a member of Congress from Iowa, would know who this Collett character is, let alone retweet him! Maybe King doesn't know about this guy's admiration for Hitler or being a neo-Nazi sympathizer? Or maybe he does? All I know is that I am proud that America's greatest generation heroically defeated the Nazis. And once again, King is showing us where his priorities are, retweeting a February article from Breitbart posted by a neo-Nazi in Europe. **King spends more time pushing his extreme agenda and glorifying right wing nationalists overseas than he does working to help the people of this district.** Northwest Iowa deserves better. [**_If you agree that Iowa needs a representative that cares more about building this district’s future than seeking to divide us, make a contribution to our movement today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1397161/7617819/-339424783?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTYzNzZlYi0yYjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0KDtry8ubRldVAuHUEZQ-jP-ruil03j0_oIFPXM3GU=)
Standing Tall for All,
J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1397162/7617820/-339424783?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTYzNzZlYi0yYjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V0KDtry8ubRldVAuHUEZQ-jP-ruil03j0_oIFPXM3GU=)

subject: Unacceptable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/SnFwMeae8x_MmOYpYmxhyFJRDsQWw4G1wczDaVtYa7M=/pyFCc9nWOwM4HfVARvWf-qusCDS7i1Ow7RJD7W8ShbY=) Friends and Neighbors -- Florida's government is unique in that the Governor and the Cabinet have a power-sharing relationship. They share oversight and hiring authority of the directors of several agencies-- including the departments of revenue, law enforcement, highway safety, the division of bond finance and the state board of administration. But you wouldn't know that if you were to attend one of the increasingly scant Cabinet meetings. That's because under Governor Scott's "leadership" Cabinet meetings are scarce and when they are held, substantive discussion has virtually disappeared. With all that's going on in Florida, Governor Scott has found it appropriate to only schedule eight meetings for this year -- while previous Cabinets met nearly every other week on average. What's been on the agenda of the three meetings that have actually taken place? Unfortunately, not much -- mostly award ceremonies and Attorney General Bondi's promotion of offering dogs for adoption. **This is unacceptable. ** [Get the Cabinet Back to Work. Contribute $20.18](https://act.myngp.com/el/SnFwMeae8x_MmOYpYmxhyFJRDsQWw4G1wczDaVtYa7M=/dpLi8oxEM8277YBnHzip_zvoV4gKsRqyDnOEdSTiQYI=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Governor Scott was the CEO of a publicly traded company and I guarantee you that he would not have conducted board meetings like this. If he had, he would have been fired. The Cabinet is no different. **This also begs the question, where was CFO Patronis? And, why didn 't he step up when the Governor couldn't be bothered to do his job? The CFO and Cabinet should be a check to the Governor's Office not a rubber stamp. ** The Governor can't finish a sentence without saying "let's get to work". It's long past time that he, CFO Patronis and the rest of the Cabinet actually tried that for a change. As CFO I will demand that the Cabinet get back to work with at least monthly meetings that focus on the business of the State, not awards ceremonies or pet adoption seminars. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more today to help me get the Cabinet back to work -- and working for you?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/SnFwMeae8x_MmOYpYmxhyFJRDsQWw4G1wczDaVtYa7M=/dpLi8oxEM8277YBnHzip_zvoV4gKsRqyDnOEdSTiQYI=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---
Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer
PO Box 670311
Coral Springs FL 33067 United States

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: June is Pride Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | June is Pride Month, the time we celebrate our brothers and sisters in the LGBTQ community. We recognize how far we've come. We acknowledge how far we have to go. And we recommit ourselves to doing the hard work it will take to reach the ultimate goal of full equality for every LGBTQ individual. | | | [I FIGHT FOR EQUALITY](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f2c/622b7b5b/1b591d43/307b8161/1460348752/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180605pm")
---
The Trump Administration is slowly and methodically trying to send this nation backward in so many ways -- one of which is by rescinding protections for the LGBTQ community. Last year, I wrote to you about how the Commerce Department tried to remove mention of gender and sexuality from its equal opportunity employment statement.
That trend has continued. More recently, Trump's Department of Health and Human Services dismantled LGBT health initiatives. The Department of Education rescinded protections for transgender students. The list goes on and on.
But you know what else has continued? **Our commitment to fighting against this administration's barely-veiled discrimination.**
This is the month where we all come together to declare that we will not sit back silently while Trump and his administration deny basic rights to Americans. _Everyone deserves to live a life free of discrimination and persecution._
[**_Let Trump know that you will not stop fighting until LGBTQ individuals have full equality under the law. Add your name._**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f2c/622b7b5b/1b591d43/307b8161/1460348752/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180605pm")
| | [I FIGHT FOR EQUALITY](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f2c/622b7b5b/1b591d43/307b8161/1460348752/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180605pm")
---
Thank you.
Debbie

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
[Click here to unsubscribe](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f2c/622b7b5b/1b591d43/307b8160/1460348752/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/unsubscribe")

name: Jody Casey, betofortexas.com
subject: Don't miss your chance to hear directly from Beto on tonight's conference call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Good morning, Beto wants to make sure you're invited to our team-wide conference call with our top supporters this evening.
Our campaign relies 100% on PEOPLE -- not PACs or big-money special interests. So when we say you're our partners in this effort to take on Ted Cruz and win back the Senate in 2018, _we mean it_. We couldn't have gotten this far without you and your support.
Tonight's call will take less than an hour. Everyone will dial in and get a campaign update from Beto, then you'll have the chance to ask some questions.
**It would mean a lot if you could join us on this conference call tonight. Here are the details:**
**Campaign Update with Beto**
**Date:** Today, Wednesday, June 13
**Time:** 6:45 pm CT (4:45 pm PT / 7:45 pm ET)
**[RSVP FOR Campaign Update with Beto](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921df/3b1d797/7fa830cc/35a9ad25/2105574507/VEsH/ "https://myaccount.maestroconference.com/conference/register/UQXV4LENA5MJ9DF")**
All eyes are on Texas in 2018. If we're going to take on Ted Cruz and win, we all have to be on the same page heading into November.
**Don't miss your chance to hear directly from Beto on tonight's conference call.[Click here to reserve your spot today.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb921df/3b1d797/7fa830cc/35a9ad25/2105574507/VEsE/ "https://myaccount.maestroconference.com/conference/register/UQXV4LENA5MJ9DF")**
Thanks, talk soon --
Jody Casey
Campaign Manager

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Virginia Republicans have elected Corey Stewart as their nominee. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | Derek:

As of today, Virginia's primaries are over and the general election is officially underway. Even before they elected Corey Stewart as their nominee, Republicans vowed to throw everything they could at me during this race. But I'm not focused on them: I'm focused on representing all of you. And I know we can be successful if Democrats stay energized and turn out at the polls. Strong turnout in 2018 is critical if Democrats want to take back the House and the Senate (which we do!), but what's more, it will set us up to support the future leaders of our Commonwealth and take back the Virginia state legislature next year.

subject: Will you sign the President’s card? 🎂

Birthdays are a HUGE deal in the Trump family.

And ever since our movement began, our family has grown by millions. The support we've received from you and other patriots has been unbelievable.

That's why I want to include you in this year's birthday festivities for my father-in-law, President Donald J. Trump. **

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: about last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Team: **Last night, I officially became the Democratic Senate nominee for Nevada.**
I couldn't have done this without you and the rest of my team. But the truth is, the real work starts today.
**Nevada's Senate race is the most important in the country - _The Washington Post_ says what happens here is critical to deciding Senate control. The outcome of this race could decide the future of everything from Obamacare and Medicare to the Supreme Court.**
**[If you care about having a senator who will fight for YOU and won't just rubber-stamp Donald Trump's destructive agenda, then I need you to pitch in $5 immediately>>](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7f6/4fbb2af3/70f8b2b1/5e8a4a6b/1741486918/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azcxNC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk714-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
With a recent poll showing our race for Senate control neck and neck, we have absolutely no room for error, and last month we missed our fundraising goal. That _cannot_ happen again.
**That's why we've set a goal of adding 2,500 new Senate Victory Members to our team by midnight tomorrow. My opponent may have Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell and the Koch brothers on his side, but I've got you.**
**Please, we're counting on top supporters like you to step up now and become Senate Victory Members:** **[Give $5 or more immediately- whatever you can afford - to become a Senate Victory Member and help us flip Nevada blue to take back the Senate!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd7f6/4fbb2af3/70f8b2b1/5e8a4a6b/1741486918/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azcxNC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk714-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: The direction of our country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hello,

This past Saturday marked 150 days from Election Day. On November 6th we won't simply have an important election -- we will determine the very direction of our country.

Will we lower healthcare costs for Americans or take away coverage from millions? Will we protect our democracy or leave our elections vulnerable to foreign interference? Will we combat climate change or walk away from our commitment to safeguard our planet and our future? **The answers to these questions depend on what we do together _now_.**

I'm working in the Senate to make sure that our country moves forward, not backward. But I can't do it alone. I need grassroots supporters like you to stand with me.

**Will you make a donation today to help me fight for our future until Election Day and beyond?**

**Contribute here:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ak-direction](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=a8XtBanBk0h5gEay44SPC0rHWKiddN09)**

Thanks,

Amy

Quentin Heilbroner

name: Senate Update 2018
subject: we're not going to meet this match deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66dd/51dbcc2a/68e3a19/3a5578e/1473506339/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") **CRITICAL MATCH DEADLINE EXPIRING** Chip in $5 to support Bob Casey __now__ and every dollar will be doubled! [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180613_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
It is absolutely crucial that we protect Pennsylvania's Democratic Senate seat this year, team. But right now Bob isn't on track to meet his $15,000 match goal, and the deadline is on Friday. President Trump has his sights set on PA, a state he won in 2016, and he's going to go _all in_ to support his hand-picked candidate's campaign, so we need to take advantage of this opportunity before it's gone.

Trump has already recorded an expensive robocall for Congressman Lou Barletta, appeared with Barletta at rallies and used his Twitter account to attack Bob. A pro-Trump Super PAC is planning to spend $100 million to unseat Democrats like Bob this year, so we have to be prepared to fight back even harder against the president's attempts to flip Pennsylvania.

**You 've probably heard that Democrats can take back the Senate in 2018, but that _cannot happen_ if we don't re-elect Bob Casey.**

Bob is counting on grassroots donors like you to step up and help meet this $15,000 goal before the match expires on Friday: **can you chip in $5 (becomes $10) to defend Pennsylvania 's Democratic Senate seat and help turn the Senate blue in 2018?**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 (Becomes $10)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180613_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 (Becomes $50)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180613_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 (Becomes $100)](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180613_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180613_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

| | Bob needs a strong team to help keep this Senate seat blue so he can continue to protect Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, fight for working families and be a check on the Trump Administration.

Will you make your first donation to help out?
[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180613_fr1_nd_rem&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Jim Morgan
subject: We're halfway there
body:
Hey Derek, When Chairman Forrester sent out our latest fundraising email, I didn't realize how great of a response we would get.
Roughly 24 hours since launching our $5,000 Money Bomb,**we're more than halfway there!**
**[We need just 80 more $25 donors to reach our goal!](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSC7OoaiBI5Vexeq2N0YNbu6wa793pAnlPN3Cmg5jRG4Z_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30Mf94A1AL4jvAAYXNZHKGZD854zgeblZQeUlN1kTF9S-2B8HR-2BOBjzC2l9k-2B8jgMiqd9J6eug0kJgpOMt1wdCDBEb0BdLkaupBnMcM4m-2BqM-2FI2-2FlYhC4PrP0SvVuKq9Nu1DoNsvo5d9phuYFU4-2FVl3utJa9VC-2FkXlLZ9GXpf984NsHVwBbZS5yuWshzhJDcX8UOuMh03B3aaMQ9BA06iL0t1djFgX1B7q3ObtOqXUpGdXxrKeBjLCz-2FadfUuY40uN-2FzfibGMLI5TP6vYNK-2FyG6e-2BqQ-3D-3D)**
I know Republicans can win on our pro-jobs, pro-economic growth agenda this November - but we need the funds to support our candidates and get them across the finish line.
We don't benefit from the D.C. fundraising swamp like the New Hampshire Democrats - **our most important supporters have always been right from New Hampshire! **

clean_body: Hey Derek, When Chairman Forrester sent out our latest fundraising email, I didn't realize how great of a response we would get. Roughly 24 hours since launching our $5,000 Money Bomb,we're more than halfway there! I know Republicans can win on our pro-jobs, pro-economic growth agenda this November - but we need the funds to support our candidates and get them across the finish line. We don't benefit from the D.C. fundraising swamp like the New Hampshire Democrats - our most important supporters have always been right from New Hampshire! Your friend, Jim Morgan Finance Chairman | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

body:
| | | [

**We need to have Kyrsten 's back as she faces new attacks. Step up now with a direct donation to Kyrsten's campaign to stop Sheriff Joe. >>**](http://act.kyrstensinema. Kyrsten is focusing her campaign on issues that matter to everyday Arizonans -- things like health care, jobs, and education.

But apparently Sheriff Joe is itching for a fight.

Here's what he told fellow Republicans at a recent event:

* "I want to go after Sinema."
* "Sinema wants to take me on? I love it."
* **" Get me there, at least let me take her on."**

Friend, there's only one way to respond to aggressive remarks like this: **with an outpouring of POSITIVE grassroots support.**

body:
It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday tomorrow and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it!

Friend,

It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday tomorrow and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it!

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73281021d839408c8768c311e915dbee&_e=ntwCWC_sBQq6qBGBAbIbS_7IBQ7r0ScB_WxfuGAD0VVMMKbgjHBOu9Pvj6BRK7grQUsPiCdP3dkYUE9kPkWhAHp0hECN1HC3FQL0iq7kAG0vWCS4LWKlPC0vsZCGOvEy4CuXolsg3wYBRUdEm-IS0T0Ojle_2OI2yBGcfqChvTfw0UX8o0uf5dImP-Dd9Q-80d2OllBkGTvAjCsccratDBQKv64QZ-78WgGmKcFrsOiQHCzNMN9z-LwiFojS7K4sr4kNlrg_xGcvBI2hjhWlUXrAO6x8eWJnkflXsRtVBWYeS-mpiDaABelBRorgcfHTHfCxx5qYr9Z-FJGADepvziDDeLDYmsZtc8CcXaLfqzcgOUH2A-H_4Tnk21zp7YzK) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73281021d839408c8768c311e915dbee&_e=ntwCWC_sBQq6qBGBAbIbS_7IBQ7r0ScB_WxfuGAD0VWP2y1xxHIBn4MgU6X4C2zYIMQDYGCsSbbNg-FiTp-eX-MCEE8oUAeO_kLtx71x-P3YrYvBNoxqIZZRWlNbQm67pTozGna71NTJ3V6xQHZkFQ6KNmqnfMAz0QS3WTpO2A-fHa9luqQQWt7Rk2-meYcvuKRZiABilbTxb4VHxgclKt8evJ83hHeG885-Ayv2EfcbjwfvfVlIu9nMj-5TpO8QGUJx-QLpIymuVGYGY4fhpPNCnGSUnAQQPeVedCdyzf4efeHuK7MirgTu1f9tmKdzI6vCmtVdSfy82LcRw0en5RTf2vRkQR90l7oV6PNqwvg0C1qyXi9YbjPLuMDgLvaV) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. clean_body: It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday tomorrow and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it! Friend, It’s President Donald Trump’s birthday tomorrow and I want to send him a card to show our support. I need you to sign it! I know our President is working hard to make America great again, and it shows! More people have jobs, we all pay less in taxes, and we're finally restoring our place as a leader in this world. Let’s make this birthday the best one yet for our 45th President. Thank you, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

Mobilize Missouri is a progressive group working to promote policies that benefit working families and the middle class. Focused on affecting change by empowering progressive leaders, Mobilize Missouri is a grassroots movement to revitalize American democracy.

Mark supports introducing a living wage, supporting LGBT equality, Medicare for All, and getting big money out of politics. We're excited to work with Mobilize MO to build grassroots change in St. Louis and across the state!

We've worked hard to build a bold, progressive and grassroots campaign and our momentum is growing due to your hard work-- thank you![ As we approach the August 7th primary, we need your support more than ever](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014-kaL3jyFHSGQEb-_e3HDniImVX2eTdP_F3nCTA7gxd-OYn_9r9uMh6ewXDYTlKCHck-4GZuYiGTentdvm8nFG6GKSFMuZVt5z29IV2owBklKcpYri1owX0SDR--EFo98g6aw1ZdBoR8J129H-yI9qh3eM_R9YXgm5qp4FScKtK5sxz8s9tVTyVKNCh9rtfeLs4c_1tMmUDLQtdgN7sPuzLWhrQHDDvpL1rY08ozIcQIzVPBiXY8HQ==&c=_M2alqFkBdC6uxegSn_VTYFJdV-IleU3wwnZr_ZlGF58rFFkXpQP-g==&ch=A04cTZvggwsph2jxrSidj2w6uvtHdVDTlbjgJIgcFRanFpjOlhz29Q==).

If elected, his first act in Congress will be to join the House Democrats who have already sponsored HR 676 (Medicare for All) and fight relentlessly to pass this bill into law. Mark is running in a suburban district much like those Conor Lamb and dozens of other Democrats have flipped since Trump took office. He's running against an unpopular, out of touch Republican incumbent who voted repeatedly to repeal the ACA and kick 24 million Americans off of their health insurance.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Trump's secret coal plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Add your name: Demand Trump drop his coal plan.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79338/2f5ea88d/709f0875/2cbcf00a/353171670/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&utm_campaign=coal-agenda&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I couldn't be more disgusted or disappointed by Donald Trump's absurd plan to intervene in our nation's energy production and prop up failing fossil fuels. The president is instructing the Department of Energy to foist a plan on utility companies that will force them to use massive amounts of coal in their energy production, whether they want to or not. It's a gross overreach by Donald Trump and senior administration officials. It's short-sighted -- and it's bad policy for our economy and our climate. [**Friend, this is as bad as it gets. Donald Trump's coal plan must be stopped. Trump's anti-science agenda must be stopped. Add your name here if you agree.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79338/2f5ea88d/709f0875/2cbcf00a/353171670/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&utm_campaign=coal-agenda&utm_medium=ema") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79338/2f5ea88d/709f0875/2cbcf00a/353171670/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&utm_campaign=coal-agenda&utm_medium=ema") Even massive utility companies oppose Donald Trump's crazy plan mandating they use coal in their energy production. It will cost consumers more, while devastating our economy and climate. Why shouldn't utility companies be allowed to use cleaner, cheaper forms of energy? Because for our president, politics trumps logic. This is the most destructive example yet of Donald Trump's ignorant agenda to rollback environmental protections while cozying up to the fossil-fuel industry. [**We have to stop him. Sign on to oppose Trump's coal plan today.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79338/2f5ea88d/709f0875/2cbcf00a/353171670/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&utm_campaign=coal-agenda&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79338/2f5ea88d/709f0875/2cbcf00a/353171670/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/coal-agenda?utm_source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&source=ema_2018-06-12_coal-agenda&utm_campaign=coal-agenda&utm_medium=ema")

name: Amanda Brown Lierman
subject: Five states voted last night → Here's what you need to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
---
With all of the primaries happening this month, we're reaching a turning point in this cycle, Derek -- here are the latest updates coming out of last night's primaries:
* **Democratic women are headed to the general election** in six out of seven Republican-held congressional districts in Virginia.
* Democrats **flipped our 43rd state legislative seat from red to blue** since Trump took office in a Wisconsin district that hasn't elected a Democrat in more than four decades.
* **Republicans in Virginia nominated Corey Stewart for Senate** , a former Trump campaign state chair with ties to white supremacists and an array of far-right extremist positions. **Now it's up to Senator Tim Kaine to defeat him** in the general.
* **Senator Heidi Heitkamp** is now facing her GOP challenger for the general -- and **defending her seat in North Dakota will be critical** if Democrats are going to regain a majority in the Senate.
* In Nevada, **Jacky Rosen won her Senate primary**. She now has a great chance to defeat vulnerable Republican Dean Heller and flip a Senate seat from red to blue.

Five states held their primaries yesterday -- and eight more had primaries the week before. By the end of this month, a total of 18 states will decide their Democratic nominees for 2018. Those candidates are shaping up to be the most diverse and dynamic slate our party has ever fielded -- but they won't win unless we have their backs from now until November.

**Can I count on you to make your first $3 contribution of 2018? Democrats are counting on your support right now to take our message to voters and win in November.**

** If we are going to flip key districts across the country this fall, we can't be shy about investing in our campaigns and state parties -- especially when there are so many Democratic candidates running incredible campaigns in places where our party wouldn't have competed in previous election cycles.

We have an impressive list of first-time candidates, women, and people of color running for office who are ready to organize and win. They are counting on our full support as they ramp up their organizing efforts this summer.

Last night's primaries mean that another round of Democratic candidates is preparing for the general -- that's why I'm asking you, Derek:

**[Can I count on you to make your first $3 contribution of 2018? Your support will help elect Democrats in all 50 states.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40522c63/4067b0a/643ee618c/7fbbeba5/2557085960/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-primaries-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-++if+consinConsGroup29422+Youve+already+s&utm_campaign=em_20180613_abl_nopreheader&source=em_20180613_abl_nopreheader&refcode=em_20180613_abl_nopreheader")**

clean_body: With all of the primaries happening this month, we're reaching a turning point in this cycle, Derek -- here are the latest updates coming out of last night's primaries: Democratic women are headed to the general election in six out of seven Republican-held congressional districts in Virginia. Democrats flipped our 43rd state legislative seat from red to blue since Trump took office in a Wisconsin district that hasn't elected a Democrat in more than four decades. Republicans in Virginia nominated Corey Stewart for Senate , a former Trump campaign state chair with ties to white supremacists and an array of far-right extremist positions. Now it's up to Senator Tim Kaine to defeat him in the general. Senator Heidi Heitkamp is now facing her GOP challenger for the general -- and defending her seat in North Dakota will be critical if Democrats are going to regain a majority in the Senate. In Nevada, Jacky Rosen won her Senate primary. She now has a great chance to defeat vulnerable Republican Dean Heller and flip a Senate seat from red to blue. Five states held their primaries yesterday -- and eight more had primaries the week before. By the end of this month, a total of 18 states will decide their Democratic nominees for 2018. Those candidates are shaping up to be the most diverse and dynamic slate our party has ever fielded -- but they won't win unless we have their backs from now until November. name: Team Donnelly
subject: Happy Pride!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Pride Month isn't just a celebration of how far we've come, it's a reminder that we have to continue the fight for equality every day. |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2191/7377f838/3c6f0f59/51f9391f/4008011833/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-pride?refcode=20180613.1&amount=20")
---
Peter,

We couldn't have been prouder marching with Joe in this past weekend's Indy Pride Parade. Joe believes that no matter who you are or who you love, all Hoosiers should have the right to live free from discrimination.

**But while Joe spent last Saturday marching in support of equality, Indiana Republicans were busy rolling back the clock by voting to confirm that marriage should only be "between a man and a woman."** Here at Team Donnelly, we know Hoosier families come in all types and sizes -- and Pride Month isn't just a celebration of how far we've come, it's a reminder that we have to continue the fight for equality every day.

Joe is proud to stand with LGBTQ Hoosiers. With the election coming up in November, we hope we can count on you to stand with him, too.

Happy Pride,

Team Donnelly

**[C HIP IN](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2191/7377f838/3c6f0f59/51f9391f/4008011833/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-pride?refcode=20180613.1&amount=20")**

|

Our opponent Art Jones is one of the most outspoken of the
white nationalists seeking office in 2018. Come Election Day,
there will be two names on the ballot in IL-3: Mine and his. But
far too few voters know what my opponent believes in and stands
for.

in the district knows what Art Jones represents. Click here to

body:

Team, _It 's that time again_ \-- I'm refreshing our donations page ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline. All of the goals we set in this race are important... but June is extra important, because it's also the end of the fundraising quarter. After the end of the month, our fundraising totals will GO PUBLIC -- so anyone will be able to see them and make judgments about the strength of this campaign. **Tom was recently named THE most endangered Democrat _in the ENTIRE_ House -- so it's really important that we show our far-right opponents that we're not going down without a fight. ** [**Can you make a donation RIGHT NOW to get us on track to smash our goal?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.13_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | ****[Mid-month deadline: Chip in>>](http://action.tomohalleran. ---

This race is getting tight, so we can't afford to start missing our fundraising goals now. If we raise another $2,102 this week, we'll be on track to meet our quarter goal at the end of June.

This grassroots team has come through for us so many times before, and I know you can do it again. [**Please chip in today to make sure we 're on track to meet our goal and re-elect Tom in November!**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=em_fr_2018.06.13_b1_lc_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thanks,

Lindsay Coleman
Finance Director

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq22018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**

"=" | ** "=" This race is getting tight, so we can't afford to start missing our fundraising goals now. If we raise another $2,102 this week, we'll be on track to meet our quarter goal at the end of June. This grassroots team has come through for us so many times before, and I know you can do it again. "=" Thanks, Lindsay Coleman Finance Director "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

In case you weren't able to join us at our election night watch party yesterday (we missed you!), I wanted to make sure you saw the impact our campaign has had in Virginia's 7th District. The energy in the air was electric, and there was a contagious enthusiasm for what we can achieve together come November 6. See for yourself in the video below.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQ0ZsHgXxh6zdxYTypJoi2YajLQUNm7Cyg06-G-fGyE=/7b9LQ3H0b61NY4yASFi0Db_FG2hFm6YdcwRT9oU9tio=?refcode=61318)

I hope you enjoy watching the clip as much as I enjoyed thanking our amazing volunteers, supporters, and all those who believe we can bring new leadership to Congress. Last night was just the beginning, and I know that by working together we can forge a new path for Central Virginia families.

Onwards,

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQ0ZsHgXxh6zdxYTypJoi2YajLQUNm7Cyg06-G-fGyE=/7b9LQ3H0b61NY4yASFi0Db_FG2hFm6YdcwRT9oU9tio=?refcode=61318)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQ0ZsHgXxh6zdxYTypJoi2YajLQUNm7Cyg06-G-fGyE=/ZCUUCURAIiLQdudL9ybsccHkwOcYOpOzqcH8ZAa3N1M=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/gQ0ZsHgXxh6zdxYTypJoi2YajLQUNm7Cyg06-G-fGyE=/u27jAyAXTHifJvqbjRt4Qrw40MYj8BryLpMaP8V6DlA=)_

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: Tennessee is heating up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Peter --
In the next few days, you’re going to be hearing from my team again about a critical fundraising deadline coming up on Friday. I wanted a moment of your time to explain why your support during these deadlines is so important.
Last week, our campaign opened our first grassroots office in Memphis. Tennesseans from all walks of life came to be a part of our first Memphis door-to-door canvas. **And they were ready to get to work.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1399887/7631465/468927790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4Zjk4OC01ZjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9rD6Mnfu7hqhP0mFbAbjjYjoP9YjNvh5UHbIx0uIgO4=&refcode=em180613-MM1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
As our team knocked on doors in Memphis, here’s what our volunteers heard loud and clear from Tennesseans: they want their next Senator to focus on bringing people together to get things done for Tennessee.
**I’m applying for the job because I have a proven track record of doing just that.**
As governor of Tennessee, I worked with Republicans and Democrats to balance eight budgets without gimmicks and recruit companies that continue bringing thousands of good jobs and investment into our state.
We tuned out the partisan rancor that dominates Washington politics and focused on getting things done for Tennesseans. I’m running to be your next United States Senator because I think it’s time for Congress to do the same. **So I’m asking:**
[**Can you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to support the campaign ahead of this week’s deadline? Your donations are making a big difference, and I appreciate your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1399888/7631466/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4Zjk4OC01ZjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9rD6Mnfu7hqhP0mFbAbjjYjoP9YjNvh5UHbIx0uIgO4=&refcode=em180613-MM1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1399889/7631467/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4Zjk4OC01ZjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9rD6Mnfu7hqhP0mFbAbjjYjoP9YjNvh5UHbIx0uIgO4=&refcode=em180613-MM1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)**
By working together to get this message in front of voters, like we did in Memphis last week, I know we can keep this going and win in November.
Thanks for being a part of this campaign,
—Phil Bredesen
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1399890/7631468/912624268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGI4Zjk4OC01ZjZmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDE1NWRjMzM3YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9rD6Mnfu7hqhP0mFbAbjjYjoP9YjNvh5UHbIx0uIgO4=&refcode=em180613-MM1-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=Peter&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Lebanon&state=TN&zip=37087&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&recurring=true)**

subject: VIDEO: "Governor Wolf Buys John Fetterman a Tie"

body:

Governor Wolf and Lieutenant Governor-nominee John Fetterman are ready to really change things up in Harrisburg.

But there's some things you just have to roll with... like wearing a necktie when you preside over the Pennsylvania Senate -- just one of the jobs John will do as lieutenant governor.

**[Watch as Tom takes John on a journey of discovery and haberdashery, in our new video: "Governor Wolf Buys John Fetterman a Tie."](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec210/73a2bc12/3a265e4c/1fcda1e5/374698949/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-tie-video?gpsid=8_50_1224&refcode=em18_180613_tievid_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_campaign=em18_180613_tievid_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=2+-+Watch+as+Tom+takes+John+on+a+journey+of+")** | [](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec210/73a2bc12/3a265e4c/1fcda1e4/374698949/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-tie-video?gpsid=8_50_1224&refcode=em18_180613_tievid_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_campaign=em18_180613_tievid_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=3")
---
Though Tom and John may have a different sense of fashion, they actually have a lot in common when it comes to their vision for Pennsylvania.

They both believe we should protect workers' rights, funding for Planned Parenthood, access to affordable healthcare, and investments in public education. But there's another thing they both have in common: They need your help to win this November.

**Once you've watched the video, chip in to make sure Tom and John have the resources to keep building a winning campaign:**

**[https://secure.wolfforpa.com/Fettermans-Tie](https://secure.wolfforpa.com/page/m/342ec210/73a2bc12/3a265e4c/1fcda1eb/374698949/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wolf-tie-video?gpsid=8_50_1224&refcode=em18_180613_tievid_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_campaign=em18_180613_tievid_fnd_gq_ful__JS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=twolf&utm_content=4+-+httpssecurewolfforpacomFettermansTie")**

Until next time,

Jeffrey Sheridan

name: Emily Cain, EMILY's List
subject: 13 of our women WON last night!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4681/24c69fd9/1a357a151/1881034e/1645845035/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER31N_digital_email_20180613_612Results_inact&source=WQEFER31N_digital_email_20180613_612Results_inact")
---

Peter,

I have more great election news to share with you!

So far 13 of our women on the ballot last night WON! (Our four races in Maine have yet to be called due to the state's new ranked-choice voting system.)

Here are some highlights:
* **Senate:** Jacky Rosen advanced through her Nevada primary. This is a crucial step toward defeating Dean Heller in November and turning this seat -- and the Senate -- blue.

* **House:** All three of our candidates won their primaries, including two in red-to-blue races.

* **State & Local:** Nine of our women won their races last night -- including women running for Nevada lieutenant governor and the Nevada state legislature.

We've had elections nearly every week in May and June. I could not be prouder that our candidates continue to rack up wins and that our community has been there every step of the way to help them.

And we're not close to done yet. We've still got a few more primaries this month -- including 18 women on the ballot in Colorado, Maryland, and New York in two weeks.

**Donate $3 now to keep the wins coming and elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Keep-The-Wins-Coming](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4681/24c69fd9/1a357a151/1881034f/1645845035/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180613_email_612results?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgKeepTheWinsComin&utm_campaign=WQEFER31N_digital_email_20180613_612Results_inact&source=WQEFER31N_digital_email_20180613_612Results_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4681/24c69fd9/1a357a151/18810348/1645845035/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180613_email_612results?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=WQEFER31N_digital_email_20180613_612Results_inact&source=WQEFER31N_digital_email_20180613_612Results_inact")

Here are some highlights: Senate: Jacky Rosen advanced through her Nevada primary. This is a crucial step toward defeating Dean Heller in November and turning this seat -- and the Senate -- blue. House: All three of our candidates won their primaries, including two in red-to-blue races. State & Local: Nine of our women won their races last night -- including women running for Nevada lieutenant governor and the Nevada state legislature. We've had elections nearly every week in May and June. I could not be prouder that our candidates continue to rack up wins and that our community has been there every step of the way to help them. And we're not close to done yet. We've still got a few more primaries this month -- including 18 women on the ballot in Colorado, Maryland, and New York in two weeks. Donate $3 now to keep the wins coming and elect pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot: ""** Thanks -- and go team! Emily Cain Executive Director, EMILY's List "" | EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List "" and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 1800 M Street NW, Suite 375N, Washington, DC 20036 Thank you for being a supporter of EMILY's List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email "". We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe "". Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

body:
Did you see the news? Trump tweeted about Tim Kaine. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **In case you missed it - Trump just waded into in our race:** [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1395/3e0906/6ab43ecd/3e3402a1/427377631/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180613_2_FR_TEAM_Trump&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180613_2_FR_TEAM_Trump&source=20180613_2_FR_TEAM_Trump") That's right: he went _directly after Tim - challenging Tim 's character and lying about Tim's agenda._

Corey has been one of Trump's most relentless supporters, **and he promises to run a "vicious and ruthless" campaign against Tim.**

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: very brief
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:

I know you've got a lot going on so I'll be brief.
The sky isn't falling, but we're about 900 individual contributions short of where we netted last quarter. Since we came up short of our goal last month, it's pretty important that we get back on track before Friday's mid-month check in.

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: The first poll of our race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Today's poll proves what we've known all along.
#

Peter -
Siena College just released the first poll of our race, and it's great news for our campaign.
**Here 's the most important part** \-- despite an attempt to coronate the establishment favorite in this race, the pollster who conducted the study says "the race for Attorney General is wide open."
Today's poll proves what we've known all along: People should not underestimate us. And if we're in this together -- if we have the resources we need -- we're going to win.
**[Can you make a $3 donation today to help us grow our movement so we can reach more voters? Your support is how we fund this campaign. Best,
Zephyr Teachout
