name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: "We need more politicians like Joe Donnelly"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
As the Journal Gazette in Fort Wayne wrote, Joe's efforts "to find common ground... offer an example that all who aspire to Congress should emulate." |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936ce/1817932583/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180613.2nd&amount=10")
---
Here's the deal, Peter. Joe Donnelly is the clear choice for Indiana. **But if we don 't step up now to support him, our next senator will be a Republican loyalist who's only interested in helping himself and President Trump -- not Hoosier families.**
**[**Pitch in to protect Indiana 's Democratic senator**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936ce/1817932583/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180613.2nd&amount=10")**
---
As the _Journal Gazette_ in Fort Wayne wrote, Joe's efforts "to find common ground... offer an example that all who aspire to Congress should emulate."

That's not the kind of senator Mitch McConnell's allies want -- and it's not who Joe's opponent wants to be. That's why **Joe "has been blistered this year in millions of dollars of overheated television ads funded by out-of-state interests"** in what's becoming the country's most expensive race, according to a columnist at the _Indy Star_.

Those out-of-state interests know that Joe only answers to Hoosiers -- that's why they want him out. But Rep. Braun? Immediately after he won the nomination, he campaigned with President Trump, raised money with Mike Pence, and **flew to Washington to have lunch with Mitch McConnell and his dark-money buddies -- who quickly embraced him as one of their own.**

So look -- if you're okay with sending another lock-step Republican to the Senate who will be 100% on board with all of the President's policies, you can sit back and relax. **But if you know we need to FIGHT to keep this Senate seat out of the hands of Mitch McConnell and the Koch brothers, then please take action now!**

**Chip in to protect Indiana 's Democratic senator and fight back against Mitch McConnell, Vice President Pence, and Rep. Braun.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $10>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936c9/1817932583/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180613.2nd&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936c8/1817932583/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180613.2nd&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936cb/1817932583/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180613.2nd&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936ca/1817932583/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?express_lane=true&refcode=20180613.2nd&amount=100")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936c5/1817932583/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180613.2nd")**
** **
**[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c219d/7377f838/3c690fac/51f936c4/1817932583/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-putupafight?refcode=20180613.2nd&amount=25")**

This way you can help Sherrod respond to his opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci's attack ads, help us hit our goal, and have your chance to meet Vice President Biden._**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff913/4462dc26/51c83110/2007c15b/3486965666/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjEyYyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612c?refcode=sbe180612c_m_other&refcode2=3268183")

**[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff913/4462dc26/51c83110/2007c15b/3486965666/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjEyYyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180612c?refcode=sbe180612c_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
Vice President Biden understands what is at stake in Ohio's Senate election.
Sherrod has a track record of standing up to Wall Street and special interests in defense of our families. Year after year he's fought like hell for working Americans -- making sure that all of our voices and concerns are represented at the decision making table in Congress.
[**_We need Sherrod in the Senate fighting for Ohio families. Vice President Biden understands that. name: Mary Ellen Smith
subject: looking ahead this summer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553ee/3135206318/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

Last week, President Trump stood on the White House lawn and promised his support for Lou Barletta -- again.

It makes sense. This is a race between a Congressman who blindly supports everything the Trump administration does and a Senator who continues to fight this administration's dangerous, anti-middle-class agenda.

It's not up for debate: Bob Casey is the only candidate in this race who you can trust to vote in the interests of working Pennsylvanians. **[Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help re-elect Bob?](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553ef/3135206318/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/061318caseymidmo?gpsid=11_63_1210&refcode=em18_180613_midmo1ndns1_fnd_gq_ndn__MES&utm_campaign=em18_180613_midmo1ndns1_fnd_gq_ndn__MES&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bcase&amounts=5,10,25,50,100")**

Congressman Barletta often brags about being the one vote that could have repealed the Affordable Care Act if he had been in the Senate last year. And the scary part is team, he's right. If we don't defend Pennsylvania's Senate seat this year, the ACA won't be the only thing on the chopping block -- Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security would be at risk, too.

The president's powerful allies and huge Republican donors are already spending hundreds of millions to try and unseat Democrats just like Bob this year. **Now, we need your help to get out ahead of their attacks and share Bob's message with voters. Can you chip in to help defend Bob Casey?

Here's the best link: [secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553ef/3135206318/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/061318caseymidmo?gpsid=11_63_1210&refcode=em18_180613_midmo1ndns1_fnd_gq_ndn__MES&utm_campaign=em18_180613_midmo1ndns1_fnd_gq_ndn__MES&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bcase&amounts=5,10,25,50,100")**

Thanks,

Mary Ellen

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Bob Casey for Senate

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
If that is not your preferred email address, you can update your information [here.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553e8/3135206318/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-contact-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") We believe emails are an important way to stay in contact with supporters, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553e9/3135206318/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/update-your-preferences?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. Want to stay updated on the campaign through social media? You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553ea/3135206318/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553eb/3135206318/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553f4/3135206318/VEsO/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e66e5/51dbcc2a/6fd320f/3a553f5/3135206318/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") from Bob Casey for Senate emails.

body:

Peter -- I would like to thank you for all of your hard work these past few months fighting to Take Back Virginia and defeat Tim Kaine. **We did it!** Without your dedicated commitment to our campaign, we would not have been successful. _But we're not done yet_.... President Trump's movement to fight for America First policies will continue with our campaign in Virginia to defeat Hillary Clinton's failed Vice Presidential Candidate, Tim Kaine. I can't do it without you. Let's #TakeBackVA! For Virginia, Corey Stewart
Candidate for U.S. Senate
